name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn, N
Idle == "idle"
Trying == "trying"
Critical == "critical"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ N \in Nat /\ N > 0
        /\ state \in [1..N -> {Idle, Trying, Critical}]
        /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] = Idle
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E p \in 1..N :
    /\ state[p] = Idle
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Trying]
    /\ turn' = turn
  \/ \E p \in 1..N :
    /\ state[p] = Trying
    /\ turn = p
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Critical]
    /\ turn' = turn
  \/ \E p \in 1..N :
    /\ state[p] = Critical
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Idle]
    /\ turn' = turn

(* Invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {Idle, Trying, Critical}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N
          /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] \in {Idle, Trying, Critical}
          /\ \A p, q \in 1..N : p # q => state[p] # Critical \/ state[q] # Critical

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn, N>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<forks>>
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ (* No change *)
          /\ UNCHANGED <<forks, states>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K. *)
(* head and tail are indices into the sequence. *)
(* count is the number of elements in the queue. *)

(* The queue is empty when count = 0. *)
(* The queue is full when count = K. *)

(* The queue is a sequence of length K. *)
(* The elements are stored in q[head], q[head+1], ..., q[tail-1] modulo K. *)

(* The initial state: empty queue. *)
Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

(* The next-state relation: either the producer or the consumer acts. *)
Next == 
    (* Producer action: add an element to the queue if not full. *)
    \/ /\ count < K
       /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]  (* For illustration, we add 1. *)
       /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
       /\ count' = count + 1
       /\ head' = head
       /\ q' = q
    \/ /\ count > 0
       /\ q' = q
       /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
       /\ tail' = tail
       /\ count' = count - 1
       /\ q' = q

(* Type invariant: all variables have the correct type. *)
TypeOK == /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
             /\ readers' = Append(readers, r) \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = Tail(readers) \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, values, chosenVal

Init == /\ acceptors = <<>>
       /\ proposers = <<>>
       /\ promises = <<>>
       /\ accepts = <<>>
       /\ chosen = <<>>
       /\ values = <<>>
       /\ chosenVal = <<>>

Next == /\ acceptors' = acceptors
       /\ proposers' = proposers
       /\ promises' = promises
       /\ accepts' = accepts
       /\ chosen' = chosen
       /\ values' = values
       /\ chosenVal' = chosenVal

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, values, chosenVal>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ channel \in Seq(1..CHANNEL_CAPACITY)
    /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
        /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
        /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ sent_chunks' == Append(sent_chunks, i)
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, 0)
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, i)
        /\ i \in 1..Len(chunks)
        /\ i \notin sent_chunks
    \/ /\ sent_chunks' == sent_chunks
        /\ retransmit_count' = 
            [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 



                            retransmit_count[i] + 1

                            retransmit_count[i]

                        retransmit_count[i]

                    retransmit_count[i]]
        /\ channel' = 
            [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 



                            channel[i]

                            <<>>

                        channel[i]

                    <<>>]
        /\ i \in channel
            /\ i \in sent_chunks
            /\ retransmit_count[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        \/ /\ i \in channel
            /\ i \in sent_chunks
            /\ retransmit_count[i] = MAX_RETRIES
            /\ channel' = <<>>
            /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
            /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>

====
